name: trainer-core
description: 客服训练核心引擎 V1

scripts.tg:clean: pkill -f 'node bot/tg-debug.js|node bot/telegram-bot.js' || true; rm -f runtime/locks/telegram-bot.lock runtime/logs/telegram-bot.log runtime/logs/smoke-test.log
scripts.tg:start: npm run tg:clean && nohup node bot/telegram-bot.js > runtime/logs/telegram-bot.log 2>&1 &
